visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with long, dark, flowing hair, wearing a lavender-colored camisole with thin straps. She is positioned centrally in front of a plain, off-white interior wall with bright, even lighting illuminating her face. She looks directly into the lens and points her index finger downward toward a stylized text overlay appearing near her chest area. (2) As she continues to address the viewer, she uses animated hand gestures, including raising her hand and pointing upwards to emphasize her points. Her facial expressions are highly mobile, transitioning between a neutral storytelling look and a slightly exaggerated frown to convey a sense of mock disappointment or frustration. The camera, held in a selfie position, exhibits slight handheld tremors. (3) Toward the end of the sequence, she makes a visible thumb-down gesture to signal disapproval, then brings her hand up to touch her chin and cheek thoughtfully. Her gaze remains fixed on the camera, maintaining a direct connection with the audience. The background remains a consistent, uncluttered indoor environment throughout the duration of the clip without any visible objects.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 淦. (2) [Subtitle]: 我被騙了. (3) [Subtitle]: 最近又有...一個男生. (4) [Subtitle]: 約我去吃吃到飽. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後呢那天我們去吃到飽過後. (6) [Subtitle]: 他根本就騙我啊!. (7) [Subtitle]: 他整晚沒有讓我吃飽啊!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female character speaking directly to the camera in a selfie shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a lavender thin-strap camisole and clear makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, off-white or light beige wall, suggesting a simple domestic or studio environment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A solo female voice dominates the audio track, speaking Mandarin with a clear and professional articulation. Her tone is conversational and engaging, characterized by a moderate speech rate and a natural, mid-range pitch. There is a faint, constant indoor room tone background, but the voice remains the primary high-fidelity signal with a strong signal-to-noise ratio. (2) The speaker’s prosody becomes more dynamic as the narrative progresses, with noticeable shifts in pitch variability and intonation to highlight specific parts of her story. There are no background music tracks or external noises, allowing the listener to focus entirely on the nuances of her vocal delivery, which exhibits no signs of roughness or strain. (3) In the final moments, the vocal delivery reaches a comedic punchline, marked by a slight increase in arousal and volume as she emphasizes her dissatisfaction. This is immediately followed by the insertion of a post-production sound effect: a short, bright laugh track representing a crowd's amusement, marking the comedic nature of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a short comedic monologue where the creator shares a humorous anecdote about being 'scammed' on a date. She explains that a man took her to an all-you-can-eat restaurant but didn't actually let her eat her fill, using a play on words to create a humorous and relatable dating story for her audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal storytelling with no product placement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media conversational video relying on the creator's personality and a comedic punchline to drive engagement.
